{"command": "python3 -c "
import torch
from pathlib import Path
from fairseq2.models.wav2vec2.asr import get_wav2vec2_asr_model_hub, Wav2Vec2AsrConfig
from fairseq2.models.wav2vec2.config import Wav2Vec2EncoderConfig
from fairseq2.models.transformer import TransformerNormOrder
from fairseq2.data.tokenizers.char import load_char_tokenizer
from fairseq2.device import CPU
import torchaudio

# Create config
enc_config = Wav2Vec2EncoderConfig(
    model_dim=1024, max_seq_len=4096, feature_dim=512,
    use_fbank=False, first_pass_dropout_p=0.0, layer_norm_features=False,
    feature_extractor_layer_descs=[(512, 10, 5)] + [(512, 3, 2)] * 4 + [(512, 2, 2)] * 2,
    feature_extractor_bias=True, feature_extractor_layer_norm_convs=True,
    feature_grad_scale=1.0, num_fbank_channels=0, fbank_stride=0, sample_fbank_every_k=0,
    pos_encoder_type='conv', pos_encoder_depth=1, pos_conv_kernel_size=128, num_pos_conv_groups=16,
    use_conformer=False, num_encoder_layers=24, num_encoder_attn_heads=16,
    ffn_inner_dim=4096, dropout_p=0.0, attn_dropout_p=0.0, ffn_inner_dropout_p=0.1,
    layer_drop_p=0.1, norm_order=TransformerNormOrder.PRE, depthwise_conv_kernel_size=0,
)

asr_config = Wav2Vec2AsrConfig(
    encoder_config=enc_config, target_vocab_size=9812, final_dropout_p=0.0,
    use_masking=False, temporal_mask_span_len=10, max_temporal_mask_prob=0.0,
    min_num_temporal_mask_spans=2, spatial_mask_span_len=64, max_spatial_mask_prob=0.0,
    min_num_spatial_mask_spans=2,
)

# Load model from checkpoint
hub = get_wav2vec2_asr_model_hub()
checkpoint_path = Path('/tmp/isolated_workspace_1091/context/omniASR-CTC-300M.pt')
model = hub.load_custom_model(checkpoint_path, asr_config, device=CPU, dtype=torch.float32)
model.eval()
print('Model loaded!')

# Load tokenizer
tokenizer_path = Path('/tmp/isolated_workspace_1091/context/omniASR_tokenizer.model')
tokenizer = load_char_tokenizer(tokenizer_path, None)
decoder = tokenizer.create_decoder(skip_special_tokens=True)
print('Tokenizer loaded!')

# Load audio
waveform, sample_rate = torchaudio.load('/tmp/isolated_workspace_1091/context/common_voice_en_444.wav')
print(f'Audio: shape={waveform.shape}, sr={sample_rate}')

# Resample to 16kHz if needed
if sample_rate != 16000:
    waveform = torchaudio.functional.resample(waveform, orig_freq=sample_rate, new_freq=16000)
    sample_rate = 16000

# Convert to mono
if waveform.shape[0] > 1:
    waveform = waveform.mean(dim=0, keepdim=True)

waveform_1d = waveform.squeeze(0).float()
print(f'Waveform shape: {waveform_1d.shape}, sr={sample_rate}')
print(f'Duration: {waveform_1d.shape[0] / sample_rate:.2f}s')

# Normalize
if waveform_1d.abs().max() > 1.0:
    waveform_1d = waveform_1d / waveform_1d.abs().max()
mean = waveform_1d.mean()
std = waveform_1d.std()
if std > 0:
    waveform_1d = (waveform_1d - mean) / std

# Run inference
from fairseq2.nn import BatchLayout
with torch.no_grad():
    seqs = waveform_1d.unsqueeze(0)  # (1, time)
    seq_lens = torch.tensor([waveform_1d.shape[0]])
    layout = BatchLayout(seqs.shape, seq_lens, device=torch.device('cpu'))
    logits, bl_out = model(seqs, layout)
    pred_ids = torch.argmax(logits, dim=-1)
    seq = pred_ids[0][:bl_out.seq_lens[0]]
    # CTC collapse
    mask = torch.ones(seq.shape[0], dtype=torch.bool)
    mask[1:] = seq[1:] != seq[:-1]
    decoded_ids = seq[mask]
    transcription = decoder(decoded_ids)
    print(f'Transcription: {repr(transcription)}')
" 2>&1", "timeout": 300}

    ffn_inner_dim=4096, dropout_p=0.0, attn_dropout_p=0.0, ffn_inner_dropout_p=0.1,

)

    use_masking=False, temporal_mask_span_len=10, max_temporal_mask_prob=0.0,
    min_num_temporal_mask_spans=2, spatial_mask_span_len=64, max_spatial_mask_prob=0.0,
    min_num_spatial_mask_spans=2,
)

# Load model from checkpoint
hub = get_wav2vec2_asr_model_hub()
checkpoint_path = Path('/tmp/isolated_workspace_1091/context/omniASR-CTC-300M.pt')

# Load tokenizer

# Load audio with soundfile

if waveform.abs().max() > 1.0:
    waveform = waveform / waveform.abs().max()
mean = waveform.mean()
std = waveform.std()
if std > 0:
    waveform = (waveform - mean) / std

# Run inference
from fairseq2.nn import BatchLayout
with torch.no_grad():
    seqs = waveform.unsqueeze(0)  # (1, time)
    seq_lens = torch.tensor([waveform.shape[0]])
    layout = BatchLayout(seqs.shape, seq_lens, device=torch.device('cpu'))
    logits, bl_out = model(seqs, layout)
    pred_ids = torch.argmax(logits, dim=-1)
    seq = pred_ids[0][:bl_out.seq_lens[0]]
    # CTC collapse
    mask = torch.ones(seq.shape[0], dtype=torch.bool)
    mask[1:] = seq[1:] != seq[:-1]
    decoded_ids = seq[mask]
    transcription = decoder(decoded_ids)
    print(f'Transcription: {repr(transcription)}')
" 2>&1", "timeout": 300}
